hooks.prompt: Before making this code change, verify alignment with docs/GOAL.md, docs/ROADMAP.md 'Now' milestone, and docs/SPEC.md (if it exists). If not yet checked in this conversation, read docs/GOAL.md, docs/ROADMAP.md, and docs/SPEC.md first and confirm the current task is aligned before proceeding.

SessionStart.description: Inject techlead-workflow skill content as trigger guidance
